message:
🐛 Show Run button and demo gate for saved missions in AI Missions sidebar (#3053)

* fix: show Run button and demo gate for saved missions in MissionChat

When a mission is imported via the landing page deep-link, the sidebar
calls setActiveMission() which renders MissionChat for the saved mission.
MissionChat had no status==='saved' branch, so no Run button was shown
despite the toast telling users to "Click Run below".

- MissionChat: add 'saved' status branch in the bottom actions area.
  In demo mode (console.kubestellar.io) shows a yellow install-locally
  banner with a "Get KubeStellar Console" CTA that opens
  SetupInstructionsDialog. In live mode shows a prominent Run Mission
  button.
- MissionSidebar: gate handleRunMission with isDemoMode() — dispatches
  'open-install' custom event instead of running in demo mode.
- Layout: listen for 'open-install' event to open SetupInstructionsDialog,
  mirroring the existing 'open-feedback' pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restore linter-reverted changes for demo gate and open-install event

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
